text: This image is a notional representation of four incidents reportedly involving unidentified anomalous phenomena Agents reported (UAP) in the western United States, as seen from above. oran " This illustration depicts multiple incidents reported by U.S. federal law enforcement special agents over a period of several days in October 2023. Agents reported observing a large "fiery orb" projected against a ridgeline at an approximate distance of 1,000 yards. Incident 3: "Dark Kite" Agents reported observing a "thin or dark kite-shaped object" featuring one red light and one white light at a close estimated range. Incident 4: "Translucent Kite" Note: All images were artificially generated using https//genai.mil/ Phenomena are enlarged for illustrative purposes and are not to Agents reported observing a "translucent kite-shaped relative scale.
